bundleSize._doc: Gzip-size budget for dist/en-lightbox.js. Baseline before wave-2: 3058B gzip. Wave-2 stream-a adds the --enlb-* token surface, layout config/normalizer, responsive classes, CTA <button> change, secondary/decline CTA, and a11y/motion hardening. Measured post-build gzip: 4100B. Budget re-baselined to 4500B with headroom.
